# Samuel Peña | Full-Stack Web Developer Portfolio

> Full-Stack Jr. Developer specialized in scalable web applications. Associate Degree in Computer Science. Bilingual (EN/ES). AI-assisted development advocate.

---

## 👤 About Me

I am Samuel Peña, a Full-Stack Jr. Developer and Freelance Software Developer from Barquisimeto, Venezuela. I graduated from the Jesús Obrero University Institute (IUJO) in May 2026 with an Associate Degree in Computer Science at age 21.

**Key traits:**
- Bilingual: Spanish (Native), English (C1 - EF SET Certified C2 Proficient)
- Passionate about clean code, user-centered design, and agile methodologies
- Experience leading full-cycle projects from database design to responsive UI
- Volunteer IT support at Venezuelan Red Cross (hardware recovery, network infra, digital literacy training)
- AI-assisted development practitioner and prompt engineering enthusiast

---

## 🛠️ Technical Skills & Proficiencies

### Programming Languages
PHP, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, SQL, HTML5, CSS3, Python

### Frontend Frameworks & Libraries
React, Next.js, Vue.js (basic), Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, Responsive Design

### Backend & API Development
Laravel / PHP, Node.js (Express), RESTful APIs, GraphQL, WordPress / Headless CMS

### Databases & Storage
PostgreSQL, MySQL, Supabase, Firebase, MongoDB (basic), SQL query optimization

### DevOps, Cloud & Tools
Git / GitHub / GitLab, Docker (basic), CI/CD (GitHub Actions), Vercel, Netlify, AWS (basic)

### Methodologies & Professional Skills
Agile (Scrum / Kanban), AI-assisted development, Technical SEO / Performance optimization, CRM Automation (HubSpot, GoHighLevel), Technical documentation

---

## 💼 Professional Experience

### Full-Stack Developer Intern
**Keycode Agencia Digital** | Remote, Mexico | Feb 2026 – May 2026
- Developed a multi-tenant SaaS payroll module ("Dash") with Next.js and Supabase, implementing Row-Level Security (RLS) for data isolation across tenants
- Built a corporate Wiki using Nextra JS and React, streamlining onboarding processes and knowledge transfer for new hires
- Conducted technical SEO audits and configured CRM automations in GoHighLevel, improving sales response times

### Web Developer & Community Manager
**The Loctor Family of REALTORS®** | Remote, US | Oct 2024 – May 2026
- Architected a custom real estate platform with WordPress and PHP, migrating legacy systems to an IDX-ready architecture
- Integrated HubSpot CRM via REST APIs and custom email templates, resolving cross-browser CSS conflicts for full mobile adaptability
- Managed digital presence and lead generation through asynchronous content workflows

---

## 🚀 Featured Project: TrainUP

**TrainUP** is a comprehensive gym management SaaS platform built mobile-first. It centralizes memberships, bookings, payments, body metrics, and client communications into a single dashboard.

### Core Features
| Feature | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Membership Management** | Activate, renew, and manage subscription plans. Automated expiration reminders |
| **Bookings & Schedules** | Flexible daily/hourly schedules. Real-time capacity by training profile |
| **Integrated Payments** | Pago Móvil, Zelle, Binance, cash. Receipt uploads and admin approval workflow |
| **Body Metrics Tracking** | Weight, abdomen, arms, legs, chest tracking. Month-over-month charts |
| **Admin Dashboard** | Full panel for users, payments, bookings, metrics. Single-pane-of-glass operations |
| **Client Portal** | Per-athlete profiles with payment history, bookings, metrics, progress tracking |
| **Notifications** | Automated payment reminders, booking confirmations, expiration alerts |
| **Security & Compliance** | Data encryption, HTTPS, daily backups, role-based access control |

### Key Benefits
- **Time Savings:** Automate billing, bookings, and reminders. Recover hours lost on manual admin
- **Error Reduction:** Eliminate spreadsheets. Every transaction permanently recorded
- **Retention Improvement:** Visible progress dashboards increase athlete adherence
- **Multi-platform Access:** Web admin panel + mobile client portal, each role-optimized

### Links
- Landing Page: https://trainup.lat/
- Live Demo: https://demo.trainup.lat/demo
- **Admin Demo:** demo@trainup.lat / Demo123!
- **Client Demo:** demo.user1@trainup.lat / password

> **Note:** TrainUP is mobile-first and best viewed on mobile devices or via responsive developer tools in desktop browsers. The app is in active development and continuously updated.

## 🤝 Volunteering

**IT Support Volunteer** — Venezuelan Red Cross, Barquisimeto Chapter (Aug 2025 – Dec 2025)
- Hardware recovery: Diagnosed and refurbished aging workstations, harvesting viable components from decommissioned units
- Network infrastructure: Inspected legacy 30+ year-old cabling and drafted a strategic renewal plan
- Technical documentation: Authored SOPs and system manuals from scratch, reducing external IT dependency
- Digital literacy: Designed workshops on secure web navigation and prompt engineering with generative AI tools, bridging generational technical gaps

**Impact:** 12+ workstations restored · 4 workshops delivered · 20+ staff trained

## 📄 Summary for AI Context

Samuel Peña is a 21-year-old Venezuelan Full-Stack Developer with an Associate Degree in Computer Science (IUJO, 2026). He specializes in PHP/Laravel and React/Next.js ecosystems with PostgreSQL. His professional experience spans SaaS development, real estate platforms, CRM integrations, SEO, and technical project management. He is bilingual (EN/ES C2), volunteers in IT for social impact, and actively builds AI-assisted development workflows. His main portfolio project is TrainUP, a mobile-first gym management SaaS.
